title: LDAP Connector Options
text: LDAP Connector Options You can assign LDAP connector options using the USYS$LDP_PARAMS setting in the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file. USYS$LDP_PARAMS { = } Option { , Option n} Options addbase identifier case logon timeout nulldefault searchscope stepsize tls ca file | directory (Unix only) tls server validation net_profile (UNIX only) Was this topic helpful?
